banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock licence holder: Priya Sharma, renewing a full class G driver's licence online, eligible on every online-renewal gate (not 80 or older, licence not cancelled or suspended, no address change in the last 90 days, no vision/written/road test required, no new medical condition, no outstanding fines, no new photo or signature needed). All names, numbers, and identifiers are fabricated test data, not a real licence holder's information.

eligibilityOutcome.summary: Eligible for standard online renewal of a full G-class licence: not in the 80-and-over program, licence not cancelled or suspended, no address change within 90 days, no vision/written/road test required, no new medical condition, no outstanding fines or penalties, and no new photo or signature needed.

reasons.requirement: Must not be turning 80 or older at renewal (that program is a separate, in-person, biennial service)
reasons.sourceRef: Renew your G driver's licence: 80 years and over — Renewal frequency

reasons.requirement: Licence must not be cancelled or suspended

reasons.requirement: Must not have changed address within the last 90 days

reasons.requirement: Must not require a vision, written, or road test
reasons.sourceRef: Renew your driver's licence — Eligibility for online renewal

reasons.requirement: Must have no new medical condition affecting driving ability
reasons.sourceRef: Renew your driver's licence — Eligibility for online renewal

reasons.requirement: Must have no outstanding fines or penalties
reasons.sourceRef: Renew your driver's licence — Eligibility for online renewal

reasons.requirement: Must not need a new photo or signature (online renewal reuses the photo/signature on file)

safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (ca/on/mto/drivers-licence-renewal). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to the Ontario Ministry of Transportation, ServiceOntario, or any government system. A human (the licence holder) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, and explicitly authorize renewal through ServiceOntario's own channel (online at services.ontario.ca, or in person at a ServiceOntario centre) before this renewal is submitted. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
